name: perspective-book
title: Perspective Book
author: SikandarJODD
description: A 3D book cover wrapper with a hover tilt effect and optional textured overlay.

name: badge
title: Badge
description: A compact pill badge with multi-color variants, optional link mode, and size presets.

name: bar-spinner
title: Bar Spinner
description: A compact loading spinner made from twelve fading bars, ideal for inline waits, cards, dialogs, and button-adjacent status indicators.

name: kbd
title: Keyboard Shortcuts
description: A tactile keyboard shortcut keycap with optional live keyboard listening.

name: marquee
title: Marquee
description: A reusable horizontal or vertical marquee with optional fade edges and hover pause.

name: logo-carousel
title: Logo Carousel
description: A grouped logo carousel with staggered enter and exit motion between rotating sets.

name: spotify-card
title: Spotify Card
description: A Spotify preview card with blurred artwork, playback controls, and server-fetched metadata.

name: qrcode
title: QRCode
description: A rounded QR code renderer with circular modules and stylized finder patterns.

name: text-marquee
title: Text Marquee
description: A vertical text rotator with snippet-based prefix and row composition.

name: blur-reveal
title: Blur Reveal
description: A text-only blur and stagger reveal for hero copy, headings, and announcements.

name: words-stagger
title: Words Stagger
description: A word-by-word blur and lift reveal for hero copy, launch messaging, and editorial headings.

name: randomized-text
title: Randomized Text
description: A stable randomized text reveal for hero copy, labels, and editorial callouts.

name: special-text
title: Special Text
description: A scrambled text reveal with optional viewport triggering and plain text or slotted content input.

name: highlighted-text
title: Highlighted Text
description: An inline highlight sweep that reveals text from configurable directions with optional viewport triggers.

name: slide-up-text
title: Slide Up Text
description: A configurable text reveal that slides words, characters, or lines upward with staggered motion.

name: signature
title: Signature
description: A handwritten signature renderer that animates glyph paths from downloaded font data.

name: gradient-wave-text
title: Gradient Wave Text
description: A flowing gradient text effect with radial or linear bands, custom colors, and view-triggered playback.

name: color-selector
title: Color Selector
description: A compact swatch picker with preset or custom CSS colors, form support, and size variants.

name: label-input
title: Label Input
description: A floating-label input with ring-color variants and password visibility toggle support.

name: animated-checkbox
title: Animated Checkbox
description: A motion-driven checkbox row with animated checkmark drawing and strike-through feedback.

name: exploding-input
title: Exploding Input
description: A particle input companion that launches custom items outward from the cursor as you type.
